Adhesive Plastic Sliding Discs in Gray 4 Pack (Set of 4) Add to Cart At a Glance Manufactured Wood Storage Included Warranty Length: 1 Year Assembly Required Description About This Product This eye-catching coffee table blends artistic design with everyday functionality to become the standout centerpiece of your living room. It features a soft, rounded oval tabletop finished with premium walnut grain veneer for a warm, smooth feel, paired with a sculptural wavy base that adds a mid-century retro flair, ditching the look of ordinary coffee tables. The 2-tier design offers both a spacious top surface for coffee cups, books, and decor, plus an open lower shelf to store magazines, remotes, and small items, keeping your space tidy and clutter-free. Crafted from durable MDF, the thick, full-bodied base provides steady, wobble-free support for long-lasting use. Whether as a living room coffee table, balcony side table, or study accent piece, it balances style and practicality to bring a relaxed, cozy vibe to your home. Plus, assembly is quick and easy with included, clearly labeled instructions and parts. Features Artistic Sculptural Design：The unique wavy base and rounded oval tabletop create a distinctive mid-century silhouette, adding a retro, artistic touch that stands out from basic coffee tables. Convenient 2-Tier Storage：The spacious top surface holds your daily essentials and decor, while the open lower shelf provides extra storage for magazines, remotes, and small items to keep your living space organized. Premium Walnut Wood Texture：High-quality walnut grain veneer showcases natural wood texture and a warm, rich tone, adding a cozy, inviting feel to any room. Sturdy MDF Construction：Built with durable MDF material and a thick, full-bodied base, this table offers reliable, wobble-free support for everyday use, ensuring long-lasting stability and safety. Versatile Style Compatibility：The soft curves and warm walnut finish effortlessly complement mid-century modern, wabi-sabi, Japandi, and minimalist decor styles, fitting seamlessly into any aesthetic. Multi-Functional & Easy to Assemble：Perfect as a living room coffee table, balcony side table, or study accent piece, this table offers flexible functionality. Assembly is quick and hassle-free with clear, labeled instructions and all included parts.
